Day One

22 events

--days left until the FSY Junior Session Begins

FSY Purpose: To help to strengthen faith in Jesus Christ and His restored gospel1, feel an increased sense of joy and belonging2, and be empowered to continue having spiritual experiences at home3.

A message from the Session Directors

Tara & Jardian Ormsby: To our awesome youth! We are so excited for the opportunity to share the FSY experience with you. We simply can’t wait to welcome, meet and grow with you. Our week together will be filled with fun, laughter and experiences designed to strengthen your faith in Jesus Christ. We love you, and want you to feel an increased sense of belonging in a safe environment with others who share your values. At the end of our time together, we want you to be empowered to continue to have spiritual experiences in your home. You are so special to us and to our Savior. We can’t wait to show you just how true that is when we come together. With love, The Ormsby’s
